title: Short Round
content:
{{Top|ga|ncl}} {{Noncanon|legends=1}} {{Nickname}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Anybodyorderapizza.jpg]] |name=Short Round |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{Tales|19|Into the Great Unknown}} |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Tan |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|What now, Doctor Jones? We continue looking for this 'monster'?''"
"''No. Let's leave him as part of the great unknown.|Short Round and Indiana Jones, discussing the "Sasquatch" Chewbacca|}} "'''Short Round'''," also known as "'''Shorty'''," was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] companion of [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Indiana Jones]]. 126 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] crash-landed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Earth/Legends|Earth]], Short Round and Jones undertook an expedition to the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] ruins in search of the "Sasquatch," which was in fact the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. They only found the [[Death/Legends|corpse]] of the ''Falcon''{{'s}} [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], which caused Jones to call off their search. ==Biography== {{Quote|What is this place?''"
"''I don't know, I've never seen anything like it. Not even in Atlantis. But it's all somehow familiar. Stay close, Shorty.|Short Round and Indiana Jones, inside the ''Millennium Falcon''|}} [[File:Indiana_Jones_and_the_Millennium_Falcon.png|thumb|right|200px|Indiana Jones and Short Round explore the ''Millennium Falcon''.]] "Short Round" and "Shorty" were the nicknames of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a companion of [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Indiana Jones]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Earth/Legends|Earth]]. Between the Earth-years 1942 and 1943,{{Twitter|HadenBlackman|status/979049283197452293|[[W. Haden Blackman]]|quote=No - they are two different characters in my mind. We never put the story on any timelines b/c it is an Infinities tale, but the Indy portion needs to be 7 or 8 years after ToD|archivedate=20200812160832}} {{C|In response to: But about Indy: Did you intended to state in Into the Great Unknown that Indy is Han reincarnated? & In which date is exactly set the story (both in the SW and Indy continuities)?}} Short Round joined Jones and a [[Indiana Jones's guide|guide]] on an expedition on behalf of a [[Unidentified museum (Indiana Jones)|museum]] to a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] to find the legendary "Sasquatch," in actuality the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. Short Round jumped over a small cliffside gap shortly before the trio arrived at the wreck of the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], which Chewbacca and his [[Death/Legends|deceased]] [[Pilot/Legends|co-pilot]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] had crashed in 126 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] earlier. Jones climbed onto the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] first before lifting Short Round up on the vessel's ramp. Short Round enquired about the nature of their current location, to which Jones responded that he had no idea and had never seen anything like it before, even in the location [[Atlantis]]. He remarked that it seemed familiar as he discovered Solo's [[Skeleton/Legends|skeletal]] remains and told Short Round to stay close. Short Round asked if they would continue searching for the sasquatch, but Jones declined, stating they would leave the "monster" as part of the unknown. ==Personality and traits== Short Round was loyal to Indiana Jones and asked him questions about their expedition and their way forward. Short Round had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and tan skin. ==Equipment== Short Round wore a red [[Hat/Legends|cap]] with a matching red [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]] over a gray [[shirt]] with light blue [[Clothing/Legends|pants]]. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Short_Round.png|thumb|right|250px|Short Round in ''Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom'']] [[w:c:indianajones:Short Round|Short Round]] was created for [[1984]]'s [[Wikipedia:Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom|''Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom'']], the second film of the [[Indiana Jones (franchise)|''Indiana Jones'' franchise]], created by ''[[Star Wars]]'' creator [[George Lucas]]. Short Round was portrayed by [[Wikipedia:Ke Huy Quan|Ke Huy Quan]] and served as the sidekick of [[Wikipedia:Indiana Jones (character)|Indiana Jones]], played by [[Harrison Ford]], who also played Han Solo in the ''Star Wars'' franchise.''[[George Lucas: The Creative Impulse]]'' Short Round was first mentioned in a ''Star Wars'' product in the [[Bantha Tracks 25|twenty-fifth issue]] of the magazine ''[[Bantha Tracks]]'', which was published in the summer of 1984 and included an interview with Quan.{{BanthaCite|25|An Interview with Ke Huy Quan}} Within the ''Indiana Jones'' universe, the character's real name was established to be Wan Li in the [[1996]] [[w:c:IndianaJones:Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom Sourcebook|''Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom Sourcebook'']].[[w:c:indianajones:Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom Sourcebook|''Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom Sourcebook'']] Short Round then appeared in the ''Indiana Jones''—''Star Wars'' [[Canon|non-canon]] crossover story "[[Into the Great Unknown]]," written by [[W. Haden Blackman]], illustrated by [[Sean Gordon Murphy]], and published in the [[Star Wars Tales 19|nineteenth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[May 14]], [[2004]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53997/star_wars_tales_1999_19|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #19}} Short Round appears older in the comic than in ''Temple of Doom'', which takes place in the year [[1930s|1935]].[[Wikipedia:Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom|''Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom'']] Blackman later stated that the comic would have to take place either seven or eight years after the events of that film. ==Appearances== *{{Tales|19|Into the Great Unknown}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{BanthaCite|25|An Interview with Ke Huy Quan}} {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] *{{LucasFanClubCite|6|Collections|Collections: If Collecting Has A Name, It Must Be Indiana Jones}} *''[[George Lucas: The Creative Impulse]]'' *''[[From Star Wars to Indiana Jones: The Best of the Lucasfilm Archives]]'' *{{InsiderCite|66|Star Wars at the Movies}} *{{InsiderCite|71|Museum Pieces|nolink=1}} *''[[Star Wars: Panel to Panel Volume 2: Expanding the Universe]]'' *{{InsiderCite|135|Red Five|reprint=1}} {{Po}} *{{InsiderCite|137|Small World, Doctor Jones|reprint=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Short Round}} {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{WP|Short Round}} *{{IndyWiki|Short Round}} [[Category:Crossover characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]]
